series_metadata.series_description: The bankruptcy files are BWC’s record of the proceedings of bankruptcy cases. The bankruptcy files contain correspondence and pleadings in bankruptcy actions in which the BWC is a party.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan the original document into UDS, verify the scanned image is readable, and then destroy. ; Electronic: The bankruptcy files are scanned into Universal Document Service (UDS). Retain the electronic version of the bankruptcy files in UDS for 30 years after the bankruptcy case closes. The electronic version information will be reviewed every 3 years to ensure that the files can still be accessed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
